body: `do_dss` is a compile-time constant that is fully determined by the space.
title: Remove do_dss from cache

body:
This PR reapplies some of the reproducibility improvements, and adds many more unit tests.

I think there are two remaining pieces:

 - [x] Unit test data movement (`reproducibility_tests/move_output.jl`)
 - [x] Unit test repro tests (`reproducibility_tests/test_mse.jl`), which happens in a subsequent process (so that artifacts are uploaded to buildkite regardless of the outcome of the reproducibility tests)
 - [x] Rename `reproducibility_tests/print_new_mse.jl` -> `reproducibility_tests/mse_summary.jl`
 - [x] Rename `compute_mse.jl` -> `reproducibility_tests/reproducibility_tools.jl`
 - [x] Delete `reproducibility_tests/test_reset.jl`
 - [ ] Use environment flags to simplify opting-in to reproducibility tests.
title: Reapply reproducibility improvements, add more unit tests
